summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ClaimSphere RCM AI Chatbot feature. All backend API tests (9/9) and frontend UI tests passed successfully.

issues: Chatbot widget not displayed on blog routes (/blog/*) - this is expected per design as ChatBot is only rendered in LandingPage component

critical_code_review_comments: Consider adding ChatBot component to BlogPost route if chatbot should be available site-wide
In-memory chat_sessions dict will lose sessions on server restart - consider persisting to MongoDB for production
seed_data_creation: TEST_chatbot_test status check created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chatbot feature fully functional. Backend uses Gemini via emergentintegrations library. ChatBot component only renders on landing page (not blog routes). All data-testid attributes present for testing.

features_tested.message_input: PASS - User can type and send messages
features_tested.api_chatbot_endpoint: PASS - Returns AI response with session_id
features_tested.close_button: PASS - X button closes chat window
features_tested.blog_page_chatbot: N/A - Not displayed on blog pages (by design)
